name: site-header (top navigation bar)

frame.notes: Header sits 20px from the top of the canvas (i.e. overlays the hero with a top inset). Total inner content width is 1300px (from inner Group 1:730) — the 1415 figure is the bounding box including the right-side overflow chevrons. Height of header bar = 56px.

rootLayout.padding: 0 (positioning handled by parent — header is absolutely placed 20px from top of hero)

items.tokenMatch: font-serif italic font-light (matches site-footer.tsx wordmark style: font-serif text-[2rem] italic font-light)

colors.notes: Header has NO background fill — it sits transparently over the hero imagery. Wordmark, tagline and nav labels are pure black, which implies the hero region behind the navbar is light/cream (so the dark text remains legible). The CTA is the only filled element.

spacing.wordmarkBaselineToTagline: tagline mt-[46.5px] (overlaid offset within the stacked group)

assets.usage: Dropdown chevron next to Teacher Courses / Advanced Certifications / Yoga Courses. Source is 'Arrow - Up 2 - Iconly Pro' rotated 180deg. Render as a 18x18 chevron-down — prefer a Lucide ChevronDown component rather than downloading the asset.
Right-side search icon button, 44x44. Replace with a Lucide Search icon inside a 44x44 hit target — no need to ship the raster.

implementationNotes: Header is TRANSPARENT — no background fill. It sits absolutely over the hero (top: 20px from canvas top in the Figma frame). When the hero ends, the header should either keep transparent + scroll-shadow on stick, or get a solid background on scroll.

Wordmark 'Bodhi' must mirror the footer treatment in apps/web/src/components/site-footer.tsx — use `font-serif text-[2rem] italic font-light leading-none`. Optionally add `style={{ fontVariationSettings: "'SOFT' 0, 'WONK' 1" }}` to match the Fraunces variable axis used in Figma.

Tagline 'SCHOOL OF YOGA' — use `font-sans text-[12px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-foreground/60`. Stack tightly under the wordmark; in Figma it's positioned via grid overlap (mt-[46.5px] with line-height 20.766), but in code use a normal vertical flex stack with leading-none on the wordmark and ~2px gap.

Nav links — `font-sans font-medium text-[17px] text-foreground` with `gap-[39px]`. The three with chevrons (Teacher Courses, Advanced Certifications, Yoga Courses) need a `lucide-react ChevronDown` 18px sibling with a 7-8px gap; treat as dropdown triggers (aria-haspopup, aria-expanded).

CTA 'Enquire Now' — pill button: `h-11 rounded-full px-8 bg-[#8ee0ce] text-[#1d3e59] font-sans font-semibold text-[14px] tracking-[0.26px] hover:bg-[#7dd0be]`. Consider promoting #8ee0ce to a token like `--brand-mint` and #1d3e59 to `--brand-deep-navy` (or reuse `brand-dark` if close).
Search icon — use lucide-react `Search` at 22px inside a 44x44 button (a11y target) with `aria-label="Search"`. Do NOT ship the Figma raster.
Chevron icons — use lucide-react `ChevronDown` at 18px instead of downloading the rotated 'Arrow - Up 2' raster.
Container width — inner content is 1300px wide. Match the page container used elsewhere (likely `max-w-7xl` 1280px or a custom 1300px container).

Behaviour: fixed/sticky to top with `position: sticky; top: 0` (or fixed with z-50). When user scrolls past the hero, transition to a solid surface (e.g. `bg-background/80 backdrop-blur` ) for legibility on content sections.

Accessibility: header should use <header><nav aria-label="Primary">…</nav></header>. Dropdown triggers must be <button> with aria-expanded; the static links (Workshops, Our Centers, About Us) should be <Link>.
Mobile: this exact layout will not fit below ~lg. Plan a hamburger trigger that opens a drawer containing the same six items + CTA + search.
rawMcpCodeReference: See get_design_context output — a single React function Group1171281731 with all label text, asset URLs, and exact spacing tokens used by Figma. Stored separately if needed.
